name: coderabbit-security-basics
description: Configure CodeRabbit for security-focused code review with secret detection and vulnerability scanning. Use when setting up security review rules, configuring secret detection in PRs, or hardening CodeRabbit configuration for compliance requirements. Trigger with phrases like "coderabbit security", "coderabbit secrets", "secure coderabbit", "coderabbit vulnerability detection", "coderabbit security review".
